task: Compare the breeds Afghan Hound, Akita and Azawakh.
final_result_response:
Here is the full side-by-side comparison of the three breeds from AKC.org:

## **Afghan Hound vs. Akita vs. Azawakh — AKC Breed Comparison**

| Category | Afghan Hound | Akita | Azawakh |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Personality** | Independent, sweet | Dignified, courageous, profoundly loyal | Independent, loyal, deeply affectionate |
| **AKC Popularity** | 110th most popular | 59th most popular | 192nd most popular |
| **Group** | Hound Group | Working Group | Hound Group |
| **Size** | Large | XLarge | Large |
| **Height** | 25–27 inches | 26–28 in (male), 24–26 in (female) | 25–29 in (male), 23.5–27.5 in (female) |
| **Weight** | 50–60 pounds | 100–130 lbs (male), 70–100 lbs (female) | 44–55 lbs (male), 33–44 lbs (female) |
| **Life Expectancy** | 12–18 years | 10–14 years | 12–15 years |
| **Good with Children** | Better with Supervision | Better with Supervision | Better with Supervision |
| **Good with Other Dogs** | With Supervision | Not Recommended | With Supervision |
| **Trainability** | May be Stubborn | Agreeable | Independent |
| **Coat Length** | Long | Medium | Short |
| **Grooming** | Daily Brushing | 2–3 Times a Week Brushing | Weekly Brushing |
| **Shedding** | Infrequent | Seasonal | Occasional |
| **Activity Level** | Energetic | Energetic | Regular Exercise |
| **Barking** | Medium | When Necessary | Infrequent |

Excellent! Both Afghan Hound and Akita are selected, and a third "Select a Breed" dropdown has appeared. Now I need to select Azawakh. Let me click on the third dropdown.
The third dropdown is open. I can see the breed list but Azawakh isn't visible yet - I need to scroll down in this dropdown or use the search. Let me use the search icon to type "Azawakh".

The dropdown closed. It seems like the search didn't work as expected. Let me try clicking on the third dropdown again.

I can see the list has scrolled - now showing American breeds. I need to continue scrolling to find Azawakh (which comes after Australian breeds alphabetically).
I can see "Azawakh" in the dropdown list. Let me click on it.
All three breeds are selected: Afghan Hound, Akita, and Azawakh. Now let me click the "COMPARE BREEDS" button.

The comparison is now showing! I can already see the first two comparison categories:
- **Personality**: Afghan Hound (independent, sweet), Akita (dignified, courageous, profoundly loyal), Azawakh (independent, loyal, deeply affectionate)
